workloads.description: 45‑minute continuous research on the same codebase and nine specification documents, requiring consistent cross‑turn references.
Call 12 tools and output strict JSON schema; disallow extra fields or enum drift.
Read invoice scan images and PDFs, extract amount, payee, and abnormal signatures.
Classify alerts and write notifications within 20 seconds after a heartbeat trigger.
Repeated follow‑up questions about large tool catalogs and subsequent tasks under long system prompts in the same session.
Batch process 800 low‑priority emails, requiring cost control and stable JSON output.
